text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 84 

HCBS_PHYS_DSBLTS_CC_IND 

LABEL: HCBS Physical Disabilities State-Reported Chronic Condition Indicator — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate whether the beneficiary had the Home and Community Based Services (HCBS) Non-
health home Chronic Condition “Physical Disabilities”; most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: HCBS_PHYS_DSBLTS_CC_IND 

LONG
